list_favorites_hint: Mark trees as favorites from their detail page.
list_empty_hint: Start scouting by adding your first yamadori.
list_sort_distance_active: Sorted by distance from your current position.
tree_delete_message: This action is irreversible. The tree and its photo will be permanently deleted.
exposure_hint_open: High exposure → rapid water stress possible
exposure_hint_forest: Protected microclimate, soil and air warm more slowly
assessment_phenology_hint: Optional — overrides GDD estimate for YRS score when set.
gdd_help_text: Growing degree days (GDD) measure heat accumulated since January 1. Each day, mean temperature above a base threshold (adapted to species or biotope) is summed. The seasonal zone indicates the yamadori window (150–400 °d). The transition label summarizes phenology — use it as a guide, not certainty.
gdd_7d_intro: 7-day GDD represents useful heat accumulated over the past week.
gdd_7d_contrast: Unlike cumulative GDD (overall season progress), 7-day GDD measures current seasonal progression speed.
gdd_7d_level_low_text: cool period or temporary slowdown in plant activity.
gdd_7d_yamadori_intro: 7-day GDD helps detect recent climate changes:
gdd_7d_yamadori_point_1: Favorable cumulative GDD with high 7-day GDD suggests increasingly favorable root activity and bud break.
gdd_7d_yamadori_point_2: Low 7-day GDD may indicate stagnation despite an advanced spring.
gdd_7d_warning: 7-day GDD is a trend indicator only. Do not use it alone to decide collection. Soil temperature, local weather and direct bud observation remain most reliable.
agri_wind_help: In strong wind, wrap roots in damp burlap or plastic quickly to prevent fine root desiccation.
agri_air_help: Adapt your gear and keep the root ball shaded during transport in high heat.
agri_soil_help: At 6 cm, aim for 8–15 °C stabilized over 5 days. At 18 cm: 9–13 °C ideal, 14–17 °C upper zone, 18 °C+ watch for water stress.
agri_rain_help: Target a window after light rain. Waterlogged soil suffocates the tree; too-dry soil collapses like sand.
agri_frost_help: Frost forecast in coming days: collect only if you have frost protection!
agri_et0_help: ET₀ measures atmospheric "thirst" in mm of water per day.
agri_radiation_help: Direct light forces stomata open for photosynthesis, causing massive water loss.
agri_hydric_balance_help: Difference between cumulative rain and ET₀ over the last 7 days.
agri_wsi_help: Index combining 7-day water balance and soil buffer.
agri_et0_cumul_help: Cumulative reference evapotranspiration over 7 days (past and forecast).
agri_radiation_stress_help: Composite solar radiation × evaporative demand (ET₀) index.
agri_heat_stress_help: Days with max temperature > 30 °C (past and forecast).
agri_gdd_season_help: Heat accumulated since January 1 — feeds YRS climate layer.
agri_soil_night_drop_help: Sharp soil temperature drop last night.
agri_yrs_help: Composite 0–100 score: climate (30), soil (25), phenology (25), hydric (20), minus stress penalties.
agri_water_hydric_help: Summary of recent rain, 7-day water balance, WSI and evapotranspiration.
agri_climate_instant_help: Air, wind and radiation conditions at collection time.
agri_frost_combined_help: Cross-references recent frost nights and 7-day frost forecast.
agri_climate_stress_help: Dry wind and radiation composite indices, plus heatwave days (> 30 °C).
yrs_chart_aria: YRS trend over 7 days. Today: {today}. Best day: {best}.
yrs_field_reminder: Reminder: field observation overrides this decision.
weather_cache_stale_days: Weather cached {count} day(s) ago — reconnect to refresh.
weather_cache_stale_hours: Weather cached {count} h ago — reconnect to refresh.
agri_error_no_data: No weather data available for this location.
agri_error_viability: No weather data for viability window.
agri_error_timeout: Weather request timed out. Try again later.
agri_offline_cache: No cached forecast — connect to Wi-Fi to refresh.
agri_verdict_wind: Strong wind ({speed} km/h) — fine roots at risk of drying
agri_verdict_soil_warming: Soil insufficiently warmed ({days} d stable at 8–15 °C)
agri_verdict_solar_risk: Risky collection — high solar radiation ({rad} W/m²), post-extraction sun shock risk
agri_verdict_et0_high: High ET₀ over last 7 days ({et0} mm/d)
agri_verdict_et0_forecast: High ET₀ forecast over 7 days ({et0} mm/d)
agri_verdict_rain_limits: Past rain limited or excessive ({rain} mm / 3 d)
agri_verdict_soil_high: 18 cm soil high ({temp}°C) — watch for water stress
agri_verdict_root_fragile: Sharp soil night drop — fragile root awakening
agri_verdict_soil_stable: Stable soil but no upward trend over 7 days
gps_waiting_online: Waiting for GPS fix — stay still a few seconds, clear sky if possible.
gps_waiting_offline: Offline: GPS works without network, but first fix may take 30s–2min. Stay still, clear sky.
gps_ready_excellent: Excellent accuracy — you can photograph and save.
gps_ready_online: Wait for accuracy to stabilize (ideally ≤ 10 m) before photo. Best position is saved automatically.
gps_ready_offline: Offline in mountains: avoid forest canopy, stay still. Without network GPS takes longer — wait for best ± shown.
gps_tip_photo: Take the photo when accuracy is best (green badge if possible).
gps_tip_still: Stay still during GPS acquisition — phone saves the best fix.
gps_tip_sky: Find a sky gap: under dense canopy accuracy degrades sharply.
gps_tip_offline_mountain: Offline in mountains: no Wi-Fi/network, satellites only — allow 30s–2min for first fix.
gps_volume_hint: Vol Down = voice note (start/stop) · Vol Up = photo (if needed) then save tree.
gps_poor_warning: Poor accuracy ({accuracy}) — approximate position in forest
gps_no_coords_saved: Saved without GPS coordinates — locate this tree on the map or via compass.
gps_confirm_no_position: No GPS position obtained. Save this tree without coordinates?
gps_confirm_poor: Poor accuracy ({accuracy}). Save with approximate position?
gps_forest_tips_title: GPS accuracy in forest and mountains
location_precise_required: Precise location required — in Android Permissions, choose "Precise" for Yamadori.
location_denied: Location denied — enable location in Android settings.
location_denied_yrs_required: Location denied — enable location to compute the YRS score.
location_unsupported: Geolocation not supported on this device.
location_bg_unsupported: Background tracking not supported on this platform
location_bg_message: Yamadori tracks your position in the forest. Disable in Settings to save battery.
location_bg_denied: Location permission denied — enable "All the time" in Android settings.
compass_permission_denied: Compass permission denied — tap to retry
voice_hint: Press Record, speak, then Stop (max 30 s)
voice_mic_denied_android: Microphone access denied. Android Settings → Apps → Yamadori → Permissions → Microphone → Allow.
voice_mic_denied_web: Microphone access denied. In Brave: site menu → Site settings → Microphone → Allow.
voice_no_mic: No microphone detected on this device.
voice_mic_busy: Microphone is in use by another app.
voice_unsupported_device: Microphone not supported on this device
voice_unsupported_browser: Microphone not supported in this browser
camera_denied: Camera access denied — allow Camera in Android settings.
visit_placeholder: E.g. Root ring prep, structural pruning… (optional if photo or voice note)
feedback_map_offline: IGN map unavailable offline — compass recommended
map_tiles_error: Unable to load IGN tiles — check your connection
map_cadastre_tap_hint: Tap the map or a tree to identify the parcel
map_orient_north: Orient north and center on my position
parking_gps_unavailable: GPS position unavailable — try again in open air.
climate_approximate: Approximate position — climate shown is indicative for the area.
climate_error_historical: Unable to fetch historical weather data.
climate_error_no_data: No climate data available for this location.
soil_sparkline_aria: Soil temperature trend at 6 and 18 cm over 7 days
geocode_not_found: No location identified for these coordinates.
geocode_timeout: Geocoding request timed out. Try again later.
cadastre_private_detail: To obtain permission, present this parcel number to the town hall of {commune}. They may legally provide the owner's name or contact them for you.
cadastre_state_forest_detail: Collection requires authorization from the National Forestry Office (ONF) for this region.
cadastre_communal_detail: Contact the town hall of {commune} and the local ONF office for collection permission.
cadastre_law_civil_546_summary: Ownership of real property gives the owner rights over everything it produces and what is attached to it (right of accession): trees and plants on the land belong to the owner.
cadastre_law_forest_l163_11_summary: Without the landowner's authorization, harvesting truffles (any quantity) or more than 10 litres of other woodland products (mushrooms, fruit, seeds) is punishable as theft under the Penal Code.
settings_cadastre_offline_hint: Cadastral parcel lookups are cached for 30 days to show land ownership hints offline.
veto_check_property: I certify that I hold written, signed authorization from the owner of this parcel (private owner, town hall, or ONF agreement).
veto_check_protected_area: I certify that the parcel is not in a regulated protected area.
veto_check_species: I certify that I checked INPN and this species is not among protected plant species (national and regional orders).
veto_check_restoration: I commit to filling the extraction hole with original soil and restoring the ground to its initial appearance.
veto_disclaimer_body: Protected zoning, cadastral data, legal references and external links shown in this app are provided for information only. They do not constitute legal advice, collection permission or a guarantee of accuracy. The Yamadori publisher cannot be held liable for any error, omission, outdated source data or interpretation. You remain solely responsible for checking applicable regulations with the competent authorities before any collection.
veto_check_disclaimer: I have read this clause and understand that information is provided for guidance only, without liability on the part of the publisher.
veto_property_intro: In France, the tree belongs to the owner of the land where it germinated.
veto_law_property_heading: A. Property law (Civil Code & Penal Code)
veto_law_cc552_text: "Ownership of the land carries ownership of what is above and below it." This includes trees, shrubs, and the soil/substrate taken with the root ball.
veto_law_cc547_text: "The natural or industrial fruits of the land [...] belong to the owner by right of accession."
veto_law_cp311_1_text: "Theft is the fraudulent taking of another's property." Removing a tree without the owner's explicit consent (public or private) is legally theft.
veto_law_cf_l331_2_text: Severely punishes unauthorized uprooting or cutting. Fines are based on volume or tree count; equipment used (vehicle, shovels, picks) may be confiscated.
veto_law_cf_l161_1_text: Punishes degradation of forest soils or tracks — hence the obligation to fill the hole and restore the ground.
veto_law_ce_l411_1_text: Prohibits "destruction, cutting, mutilation, uprooting, picking or removal" of protected plant species — even with the landowner's consent.
veto_law_ce_l415_3_text: Criminal provisions: harming protected plant species — offence punishable by 3 years' imprisonment and €150,000 fine.
veto_species_inpn_body: Before any collection, check on the official INPN (MNHN) database that the species is not protected by a national or regional order. A red "Protected species" badge means collection is a criminal offence, even with owner consent.
veto_species_regional_pdl: Pays de la Loire region detected (GPS): subject to the 25 January 1993 order. Wetlands, heathland and coastal dunes (Gâvre, Loire hillsides, marshes) have many strictly protected species.
veto_species_regional_generic: Over 400 species are nationally protected, and hundreds more regionally. Always check INPN — do not rely on a fixed in-app list.
veto_species_examples_body: Order of 20 January 1982 (non-exhaustive): Dwarf birch (Betula nana), Salzmann pine (Pinus nigra subsp. salzmannii), some wild willows (Salix lapponum, S. repens…), Daphne species.
veto_scan_clear: No national park or national nature reserve detected at this GPS point.
veto_scan_cached: Result from local cache (area already scanned or offline mode).
veto_automatic_block: Collection forbidden — absolute protection zone detected.
veto_zone_pnr_hint: Park charter — check local rules before any collection.
veto_zone_rnr_regional_hint: Regional, Corsican or hunting reserves — constraints vary by order.
veto_zone_natura_hint: Subject to impact assessment or specific prefectural order.
veto_zone_znieff_hint: Ecological interest zone — check local constraints.
veto_zone_appb_hint: Strict habitat protection — check prefectural orders.
veto_zone_status_certain: Zone detected at your GPS position.
veto_zone_status_potential: Your cadastral parcel may overlap this zone.
veto_zone_appb_manual: No national coverage — check prefectural orders for your department.
settings_display_hint: High-readability interface for use in bright sunlight. Less aesthetic, but readable outdoors.
settings_outdoor_hint: White background, black text, thick borders and bold fonts.
settings_outdoor_android_brightness: On the Android app, screen brightness goes to maximum.
settings_dark_hint: Pure black background to save battery on OLED screens. Mutually exclusive with bright sun mode.
settings_offline_map_hint: On the map, tap Offline, then pinch and drag to position the zone under the centered green square.
settings_offline_tip_1: Topographic and satellite maps downloaded together
settings_offline_tip_2: Two zoom levels around current view
settings_offline_tip_3: Kept about 30 days · up to 10,000 tiles
settings_weather_offline_hint: Open-Meteo forecasts are cached to power YRS score offline, within about 30 km.
settings_backup_hint: Full backup of your data ({count} tree{s} currently). Set a password once — it will be reused automatically for future exports.
settings_backup_password_hint: The password encrypts the entire file. If you forget it, the backup cannot be recovered.
settings_backup_password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.
settings_backup_password_reset_message: The configuration will be cleared on this device. Already exported backups remain protected by the old password.
settings_backup_password_reset_with_hint: Hint: {hint} — The configuration will be cleared on this device. Already exported backups remain protected by the old password.
settings_backup_password_hint_help: The hint helps you remember; it cannot recover the password.
settings_backup_password_unavailable: Password unavailable on this device — set it up again in settings.
settings_legacy_json_hint: Legacy JSON v1 format (no password). Prefer ZIP for new backups.
settings_gps_android_hint: GPS accuracy at photo time is essential for scouting. The app uses high-precision mode and saves the best fix during capture.
settings_gps_tip_offline: Offline in mountains: GPS works without network but first fix may take longer
settings_gps_tip_still: Stay still, clear sky, before photographing
settings_bg_tracking_hint: Android requires "All the time" permission and shows a notification during tracking.
settings_bg_enabled: Background tracking enabled. Android will show a persistent notification on map and compass.
settings_onboarding_reset: Permissions wizard reset — restart the app.
settings_loading_wait: Data still loading — try again in a moment.
settings_replace_message: Local trees and parking will be replaced by the backup. This action is irreversible.
archive_empty_file: Empty or inaccessible file — try selecting the backup again.
archive_legacy_format: This backup uses the legacy format (password). Re-export with the current app version.
archive_too_large: Archive too large to import on this device.
archive_corrupt_encrypted: Corrupt backup or invalid encrypted data.
onboarding_welcome_desc: Never lose track of your yamadori again — the app saves a GPS location for each of your finds! A few permissions will be requested next (GPS, photos, voice notes).
onboarding_location_desc: GPS geotags each tree photo. Choose "Precise" (not "Approximate") when Android asks. For background tracking, "Allow all the time" in settings.
onboarding_camera_desc: To photograph trees and record voice notes in the field.
onboarding_notifications_desc: Android shows a notification during background GPS tracking. Recommended if you enable this in Settings.
onboarding_compass_desc: Device orientation improves navigation to your trees. You can also enable it later.
onboarding_location_denied: Location denied — you can enable it in Android Settings.
onboarding_camera_partial: Partial permissions — complete in Settings if needed.
onboarding_camera_denied: Access denied — you can authorize during capture.
onboarding_notifications_denied: Notifications denied — background GPS tracking still usable.
onboarding_compass_denied: Compass not enabled — button available on compass screen.
onboarding_legal_desc: Collecting trees in the wild (yamadori) requires the landowner's explicit permission (French Civil Code art. 546) and compliance with protected species rules. This app publisher only provides weather and agronomic data. By using this tool, you agree to comply with applicable laws and protect the environment.
onboarding_backup_desc: Your scouting data is stored only on this device: your data stays private, secure and protected. Export a backup regularly to another physical medium (USB drive, computer…) or personal cloud (Google Drive, etc.) from Settings → Backup.
simple_mode_active: Focus mode on — less on-screen clutter
onboarding_simple_mode_hint: Already comfortable? The « Focus mode » button at the top hides analysis panels for a more direct scouting flow.
store_trees_corrupt: Local data unreadable — try a backup or reinstall the app.
